Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-19-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Joel Liberson, Esq. for Petitioner: Maria Zuniga Jovel, present as Guardian at litem for: Elizabeth Zuniga Hernandez, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
A net balance of $12,225.15 to be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America, 2701 Mission St., San Francisco, CA. 94110, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
See scanned doc. for details of the Compromised, Attorney's Fees and Costs.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
